name: django-jstocks

metadata.name: django-jstocks
metadata.license: Copyright (C) Jani Kajala. All rights reserved

documentation:
Library for Managing Shares Issuance
====================================

Features
--------
* Share registry, ownership information and parties
* Share authorization and allocation to subscribers
* Share transfers
  * Share ownership tracking by sequences
  * Sequence has constant space requirement independent of sequence length
* Double entry accounting system


Install
-------

* pip install django-jshares


About Terminology
-----------------

Issued shares = number of shares of a corporation which have been allocated (allotted) and are subsequently held by shareholders

Issuance = The act of creating new issued shares is called issuance, allocation or allotment. Allotment is simply the creation of shares and their transfer to a subscriber. After allotment, a subscriber becomes a shareholder, though usually that also requires formal entry in the share registry.

Total authorized shares = The number of shares that can be issued. Issued shares are those shares which the board of directors and/or shareholders have agreed to allocate. 

Issued shares are the sum of outstanding shares held by shareholders; and treasury shares are shares which had been issued but have been repurchased by the corporation, and which generally have no voting rights or rights to dividends.

Shares are most commonly issued fully paid, in which case the liability of the shareholders is limited to the amount paid on the shares; but they may also be issued partly paid, with unlimited liability, subject to guarantee, or some other form.

So, as summary, the basic formula:

* Shares authorized = Shares issued + Shares unissued
* Shares issued = Shares outstanding + Treasury shares

(source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Issued_shares)

functions.name: setup.parse_requirements
documentation: load requirements from a pip requirements file

functions.name: jstocks.services.allocate_shares
documentation:
Allocate shares to owner.
Debit tx to user's stock account.
Credit tx to user's cash account.
Returns [debit, credit] transactions list.

functions.name: jstocks.services.authorize_and_allocate_shares
documentation:
Authorize and allocate shares to owner.
Debit tx to user's stock account.
Credit tx to user's cash account.
Returns authorized shares and [debit, credit] transactions list.

functions.name: jstocks.services.list_shares
documentation: List current shares after executing all transactions in the queryset.

functions.name: jstocks.services.get_share_list
documentation:
Returns shares share sequences by share type and [begin, end) range.
AuthorizedShares instance is returned in parent field of the Seq-objects.

functions.name: jstocks.services.list_share_types
documentation: Lists all share types owned (currently or before) by this owner.

methods.name: jstocks.admin.JStocksAdminBase.get_queryset
documentation:
By default, returns empty queryset for normal is_staff user.
Access filter can be configured using issuer_staff_user_filter.
For is_superuser, whole queryset is returned.

functions.name: jstocks.seq.split_seq
documentation:
Splits sub sequence from the parent.
Returns remaining sequence in parent.

functions.name: jstocks.seq.make_seqs
documentation: Returns list of maximum length sequences from arbitrary list of ints.

functions.name: jstocks.seq.merge_seqs
documentation: Returns a new list of sequences with continuous sequences merged together.

functions.name: jstocks.seq.parse_seqs
documentation:
Parses "4000001-4000120, 4000121-4000130" style list of [first,last] ranges.
Note that ranges are INCLUSIVE, but Seq() object uses exclusive range end.

methods.name: jstocks.seq.Seq.contains_seq
documentation: Returns True if this Seq fully contains sub sequence.

methods.name: jstocks.seq.Seq.contains_value
documentation: Returns True if this Seq contains x.

methods.name: jstocks.seq.Seq.sum_count
documentation: Iterates over Seq objects and returns their summed counts.

methods.name: jstocks.models.PartyManager.get_by_search
documentation:
Finds Party instance by trying following:
1) exact id match
2) case-insensitive name match
3) exact email match
4) exact phone match
5) case-insensitive last name match
Raises jstocks.models.Party.DoesNotExist if not found,
and jstocks.models.Tx.MultipleObjectsReturned if multiple matches.

methods.name: jstocks.models.TxManager.filter_balance
documentation: Filters all same-owner-same-account txs leading to this tx, including this one.

methods.name: jstocks.models.Tx.get_balance_and_total_count
documentation: Returns balance and accumulated share count up to this transaction (including this one).

methods.name: jstocks.models.Tx.balance
documentation: Returns sum of amount up to this (including this) transaction.

methods.name: jstocks.models.Tx.total
documentation: Returns sum of count up to this (including this) transaction.
